What's up, Jim Launchers? So, now that we have created our Zapier account, we're going to go ahead and make our first Zap. So, go ahead and click on the Make a Zap button, and that's going to load the Zapier builder. So, the first Zap that we make, we're going to name the Submission Zap. We're going to be taking information that was submitted into ClickFunnels and transferring it over to that Google Sheet. So, we're going to have our trigger event begin with ClickFunnels. So, if you have ClickFunnels here, go ahead and click on it. If not, you'll want to type it up here, and then choose it from the drop-down. Our trigger event is going to be New Contact Activity, and then we'll go ahead and hit Continue. And then you're going to need to sign in to your ClickFunnels account if you have not already. You'll be able to select it right in the drop-down. From here, you'll hit Continue again. And now it's going to ask you to identify which funnel you want the information to come from. So, you would go ahead and click the drop-down here and choose your funnel. We have a lot of funnel choices at Jim Launch. So, in order to make things a bit faster, I did something slightly different. You will not need to do that though. So, you'll select your funnel from the drop-down here. And then on the Funnels step, you're going to choose the first page of your funnel. So, for us, that's going to be the 42-day detox landing page. Go ahead and click the Continue button. And from here, it is going to ask you if you would like to use a test contact. So, I have already pulled in a test contact and this should be something that you already have from when we tested our Acuity scheduler. So, now, I'm just going to go ahead and click Done Editing. From here, I'm going to go ahead and add a step. And I'm going to hook this up to Google Sheets. So, with our Google Sheets, our Action Event is going to be creating that spreadsheet row. So, we'll click Continue. And it will ask us to either login or select our Google account. So, I'm going to go ahead and do that now. And then you'll click Continue again. From here, we have to tell Zapier which sheet we want it to use. So, we're going to select our Leads and Stat Sheets. And then where it needs to put the information, which is going to be on that Incoming Leads tab. It'll then find the sheet and populate all the rows that it can. And now we're going to match them up with the information and click files. So, the date is going to be our created app. First name to first name. Last name to last. Email to email. And last but not least, our phone number. We will not have an appointment time on this app because ClickFunnels does not pull that in. That's going to be an acuity. So, we're going to go ahead and click Continue. And we're going to send a test to our spreadsheet. And it looks like our Zap is ready. So, from here, I'm going to go ahead and check. And there is our information. So, now that we're done with this step, our next video will be going over an optional text messaging step. And then after that, we'll get that appointment time in there.
